calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Reset To Jun-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Linda S. Forster, #13286.

Petitioner Tsuyoshi Ito Lee was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Charles Zhang was placed under oath and served as Mandarin speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in file.

Due to a typographical error, petitioner's date of birth is listed incorrectly in his Petition for Change of Name.
Good cause appearing, the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name is continued to June 26, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
No further publication required.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Amended
